title: User management screen (admin creates user, sets role)
description: Build an admin-only screen listing all users and allowing creation of new users with email, initial password, and role (admin/editor).
acceptanceCriteria: `/admin/users` route is only reachable by users with role `admin`; editors attempting to navigate there see an access-denied state or are redirected
Screen lists existing users with email and role columns
'Create user' form collects email, initial password, and role, and calls the `users.create` mutation (TASK-14)
Successful creation adds the new user to the list without a full page reload
Duplicate email submission shows an inline error from the server's unique constraint violation

steps.details: Create `apps/admin/src/features/users/UsersList.tsx` querying `users.list` and rendering a table with email and role columns.
Create a form with email (validated), password (min length), and a role select (`admin`/`editor`). On submit, call `users.create` mutation.
Catch the `CONFLICT`/`BAD_REQUEST` error returned by `users.create` on duplicate email and display it inline on the email field.
On successful creation, invalidate/refetch the `users.list` query (or optimistically prepend the new user) so the table updates without reload.

steps.description: Guard the route for admin-only access
steps.details: Wrap `/admin/users` in a route guard checking the current user's role is `admin`; render an access-denied message for editors.
Using Playwright: log in as admin, navigate to `/admin/users`, create a new editor user, assert it appears in the list; log in as that editor and confirm navigating to `/admin/users` is blocked.

technicalNotes: This is admin-only regardless of the confirmed 'editor has full CRUD on content structure' decision — user/role management remains admin-exclusive per PRD Fase 1.
